title: Lifeguards, Ski Patrol, and Other Recreational Protective Service Workers
description: Monitor recreational areas, such as pools, beaches, or ski slopes, to provide assistance and protection to participants.

tasks.text: Patrol or monitor recreational areas, such as trails, slopes, or swimming areas, on foot, in vehicles, or from towers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Rescue distressed persons, using rescue techniques and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Contact emergency medical personnel in case of serious injury.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine injured persons and administer first aid or cardiopulmonary resuscitation, if necessary, using training and medical supplies and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Warn recreational participants of inclement weather, unsafe areas, or illegal conduct.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain quality of pool water by testing chemical levels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Complete and maintain records of weather and beach conditions, emergency medical treatments performed, and other relevant incident information.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Instruct participants in skiing, swimming, or other recreational activities and provide safety precaution information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect recreational equipment, such as rope tows, T-bars, J-bars, or chair lifts, for safety hazards and damage or wear.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Observe activities in assigned areas, using binoculars, to detect hazards, disturbances, or safety infractions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide assistance with staff selection, training, and supervision.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide assistance in the safe use of equipment, such as ski lifts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Participate in recreational demonstrations to entertain resort guests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
